title: ALTER UPDATE AzureBlobStorage SEGV
description:
### Describe the bug
Easy to reproduce. cc @kssenii or @SmitaRKulkarni any of you can look at this? I think there is a validation missing. I see MergeTreeData being called for AzureBlobStorage?
### How to reproduce
Set Azurite emulator running, then do:
```sql
CREATE TABLE t0 (c0 Int) ENGINE = AzureBlobStorage(azure, blob_path = 'f0.data', format = 'Parquet');
ALTER TABLE t0 UPDATE c0 = 1 WHERE TRUE SETTINGS query_plan_optimize_prewhere = 0; --SEGV
```
### Error message and/or stacktrace
Stack trace:

bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1 (id INTEGER, name TEXT, created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
UPDATE t1 SET name = 'Charlie' WHERE id = 1;
CREATE TABLE t2 (id INTEGER, value REAL, description TEXT);
INSERT INTO t2 (id, value, description) VALUES (1, 10.5, NULL), (2, 20.0, 'Sample');
key_bug_features: ALTER TABLE UPDATE on AzureBlobStorage engine
